observed_evidence: Playwright strict mode indicates that one locator matched multiple elements.
test_case_outcomes.suggested_fix_area: Replace the ambiguous selector with a unique role/test-id/label locator in the reusable page object; avoid nth() unless business order is stable.

test_case_outcomes.test: ui\dashboard.spec.ts › Dashboard – Customer Portal › Dashboard shows sold lease status message
test_case_outcomes.plain_english_reason: test timed out; likely slow AUT, navigation/state wait, or blocked locator/action
observed_evidence: The test/action exceeded its timeout without enough evidence to assume a locator-only problem.
test_case_outcomes.likely_fix_layer: workflow synchronization, navigation, network or locator layer
test_case_outcomes.suggested_fix_area: Use trace timing to identify the exact unfinished action. Add a condition-based wait in the reusable flow only when the expected state is proven; do not add waitForTimeout.
test_case_outcomes.validation_steps: Review the final trace action, network and screenshot, then rerun with the same 30-second guard.

plain_english_summary: 2 spec(s) failed. Primary RCA category: Locator Not Found Or Ambiguous. See the test-by-test outcome table for exact passed/failed tests and reasons.
what_likely_happened: The test most likely waited for an element that was missing, unstable, hidden, or matched by an outdated locator.
The failure may be an assertion difference. Changing the expected value should require manual approval unless evidence proves it is a harmless copy update.
safe_next_action: Apply self-healing only if the policy gate allows it; otherwise raise manual review/product/environment issue.
recommended_human_steps: Open the Playwright trace and screenshot for the failed spec.
Check whether the failed locator belongs in pageObjects rather than the spec file.
Check API status/auth/session/test data before patching UI flow.
Review Codex patch diff; reject assertion weakening, test skips, hard waits, and force clicks.
Rerun failed specs only, then merge the retry result into the original report.
source: AstraHeal exact Playwright inventory plus deterministic error classification

latest_playwright_router.purpose: Stage-aware link to the latest first-run or failed-only Playwright report.

native_playwright_copy.purpose: Central retained copy of the latest native Playwright HTML report.

combined_first_run_rerun.purpose: Combined first-run and failed-only rerun ledger.

plain_english_rca_html.purpose: Explainable test-by-test Plain English RCA report.

root_cause_html.purpose: Detailed RCA evidence and auditable checklist.

self_healing_html.purpose: Safe-fix proposal/apply result, impacted files, backup and rollback details.

failed_inventory.purpose: Latest failed specs and failed test cases used by RCA and failed-only rerun.

execution_report.purpose: Latest execution command, exit code and artifact evidence.

report_manifest.purpose: Stage-aware report links and latest report pointers.

runtime_events.purpose: Append-only runtime progress and diagnostic events.

ai_action_history.purpose: Observable AI action and patch history.

human_intervention_memory.purpose: Human approval, guidance and approved-file memory.

backup_root.purpose: Timestamped backups created before approved self-healing changes.

framework_native_candidates.purpose: Playwright default native HTML location when the framework does not override outputFolder.
AstraHeal-compatible native HTML location inside the selected framework.
Native Playwright traces, screenshots, videos and attachments.
AstraHeal-compatible test-results location inside the framework.
Exact streamed Playwright command output for the latest local/sequential execution.

explanation.playwright: Playwright first writes its native report under the selected framework. AstraHeal then copies/retains the latest report under generated-playwright/reports/existing-framework so GUI links remain stable.
explanation.rca_self_healing: RCA and self-healing reports are retained centrally under generated-playwright/reports/existing-framework; supporting memory, runtime logs and backups are under .qa-cache.

message: Each failed test now shows the observed evidence, failure category/confidence, likely fix layer, recommended files, safe action, validation steps and self-healing safety decision.

generic_summary.plain_english_summary: 2 spec(s) failed. Primary RCA category: Locator Not Found Or Ambiguous. See the test-by-test outcome table for exact passed/failed tests and reasons.
what_likely_happened: The test most likely waited for an element that was missing, unstable, hidden, or matched by an outdated locator.
The failure may be an assertion difference. Changing the expected value should require manual approval unless evidence proves it is a harmless copy update.
generic_summary.safe_next_action: Apply self-healing only if the policy gate allows it; otherwise raise manual review/product/environment issue.
recommended_human_steps: Open the Playwright trace and screenshot for the failed spec.
Check whether the failed locator belongs in pageObjects rather than the spec file.
Check API status/auth/session/test data before patching UI flow.
Review Codex patch diff; reject assertion weakening, test skips, hard waits, and force clicks.
Rerun failed specs only, then merge the retry result into the original report.
